description: CompositionRed round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, lettering in graphic print on the front in a distressed look, and brand tab appliqued on the sideFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool water at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperature or lay flat to dryWarm ironDo not iron on printThis red t-shirt from doodle is made specially for your smart kid. The text on the front “Yes I am as smart as I look” is so perfect for him, as he really does look as super smart as he is! Team this cute tee with jeans or denim shorts and shower your love on the precious darling.
